---
title: "Graphics Feed"
description: "Downloadable MLB player, pitch, and team change graphics from The SABRhood visual desk."
---

::: {.page-intro .page-intro--dark}
<span class="eyebrow">Visual analysis library</span>

# The biggest baseball changes, made visible

Players moving furthest from their earlier baseline, pitches changing shape or
usage, and teams separating from the league mean—selected by data and presented
for articles, newsletters, video, social publishing, and broadcast research.
:::

{{< include includes/graphics-feed.html >}}
